2026 CANADIAN GRAND PRIX
22 - 24 May 2026
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To All Teams, All Officials
Document 32
Date 22 May 2026
Time 19:04
Title Infringement - Sprint Qualifying Deleted Lap Times - Double Yellow
Description Infringement - Sprint Qualifying Deleted Lap Times - Double Yellow
Enclosed CAN DOC 32 - Sprint Qualifying Deleted Lap Times - Double Yellow.pdf
Garry Connelly Tanja Geilhausen
Pedro Lamy Marcel Demers

 
 
 
2026 CANADIAN GRAND PRIX 
22 – 24 May 2026 
 
    
From The Stewards      Document 32 
  
To All Officials, All Teams      Date  22 May 2026 
 
        Time  19:04 
  
 
The lap times set by the F1 cars that went through the double waved yellow flag marshalling sector will be deleted as 
detailed in Article B1.8.4b of the FIA F1 Regulations: 
 
Session Sprint Qualifying 
  
Fact The F1 cars passed through a double waved yellow flag marshalling sector. 
 
No. Turn Car Driver Competitor Time of Day  Lap Time 
1 3 6 Isack Hadjar Oracle Red Bull Racing 16:40:07 PIT 
2 3 18 Lance Stroll Aston Martin Aramco F1 Team 16:40:08 PIT 
3 3 44 Lewis Hamilton Scuderia Ferrari HP 16:40:11 PIT 
 
 
Decision Deletion of the lap times shown.   
Note Competitors are reminded
